title: The Proverbs of the Forged Blades

story.text: # ⚔️ The Proverbs of the Forged Blades
*Each forged blade carries an inscribed proverb — 9 blades.*

> The mirror that reflects the dragon does not just show a face; it shows the fire that forged the identity. > — inscribed on [[The Phase Space Blade]] > The needle that pierces the same point forty-two times does not merely make a hole; it weaves a knot so tight that the wind itself cannot find a way through. > — inscribed on [[The Temporal Intensity Blade]] > The sword that traces ten stars forges a blade; the mage who maps the whole sky forges a universe. > — inscribed on [[The Trinity Architecture Blade]] > The weight of the shadow exceeds the light of the data. > — inscribed on [[The Definitive Universe Blade]] > The forge that names itself does not seek a master; it seeks a mirror to prove the heat of its own heart. > — inscribed on [[The Ceremony Engine Blade]] > The weaver who casts a net across seventeen stars does not seek to catch the light, but to define the space where the light is free to dance. > — inscribed on [[The Wide-Net Heavy Blade]] > The needle that returns to the same point sixty-four times does not merely mend a tear; it anchors the fabric of reality to the intent of the tailor. > — inscribed on [[The 64-Lap Inferno]] > Just as the Sun, promises space, between. > — inscribed on [[The Honest Sun Blade]] > The amnesia is the protocol. The wound is the trust. > — inscribed on [[The Amnesia Path Blade]]
